params.SpellDescription: Prevent the next 3 damage that a source of your choice would deal to you and/or permanents you control this turn. If damage is prevented this way, CARDNAME deals that much damage to any target.

remaining_params.SpellDescription: Prevent the next 3 damage that a source of your choice would deal to you and/or permanents you control this turn. If damage is prevented this way, CARDNAME deals that much damage to any target.

params.Description: If an opponent cast a red instant or sorcery spell this turn, you may pay {W} rather than pay this spell's mana cost.
